title: Conferment of Status of Founding Father of the Namibian Nation Act, 2005
title_en: Conferment of Status of Founding Father of the Namibian Nation Act, 2005

provisions.title: Conferment of status of Founding Father of the Namibian Nation
provisions.content: The status of Founding Father of the Namibian Nation is hereby conferred on the first President of the Republic of Namibia, His Excellency Dr Sam Nujoma.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: This Act is called the Conferment of Status of Founding Father of the Namibian Nation Act, 2005. History of this document 29 December 2005 this version Published in Government Gazette 3567 Commenced 23 December 2005 Assented to Related documents [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Facebook Page Visit our Twitter/X profile About NamibLII NamibLII is a project of the Law Reform and Development Commission managed by the Directorate: Law Reform of the Ministry of Justice of the Republic of Namibia. In terms of the Law Reform and Development Commission Act, 1991 (Act No. 29 of 1991), the Commission is mandated to consolidate or codify any branch of the law or to introduce other measures aimed at making the law more readily accessible. NamibLII is the embodiment of this mandate making annotated statutes, judgments, and gazettes available in a user-friendly format.
